one_liner: Real-time revenue analytics for B2B SaaS teams
target_customer: Revenue Operations leaders at SaaS companies with 50-500 employees
pain_points: Manual spreadsheet reporting wastes hours each week
Data scattered across CRM, billing, and product tools
No single source of truth for ARR and churn metrics
differentiators: Connects to 40+ SaaS tools with one-click integrations
Pre-built RevOps dashboards ready in under 30 minutes
AI anomaly detection flags revenue risks before they escalate
No SQL or engineering support required
case_studies: Helped Acme HR reduce reporting time by 70% in 60 days
TechFlow scaled from $1M to $5M ARR using DataPulse pipeline health scores
icp: RevOps or Finance at B2B SaaS, Series A–C, 50–500 employees, using Salesforce or HubSpot
